component.name: Omnio
component.summary: Track your hobbies — local-first, no accounts, no cloud

description.p: Omnio is a local-first desktop app to track your hobbies — games, music, movies, series, anime, donghua, manga, manhwa, manhua and western comics — all in one place. No accounts, no telemetry, no cloud. Data lives in a single data.json file and an assets/ folder, portable enough to carry on a USB stick.
